name: Potassium
description: Infomaniak OpenClaw tools backed by the liquid-potassium Node SDK.

tokenEnvName.description: Environment variable name used for the Infomaniak API bearer token.

baseUrl.description: Infomaniak API base URL. Defaults to https://api.infomaniak.com.

mailApplicationBaseUrl.description: Infomaniak Mail application API base URL. Defaults to https://mail.infomaniak.com.

allowedDomains.description: Optional domain allowlist such as kdrive, mail, or kchat.

blockMutating.description: When true, mutating operations are blocked even if requested explicitly.

kchat.label: Infomaniak kChat
kchat.description: Infomaniak kChat channel scaffold backed by the Potassium Infomaniak SDK.

name.description: Optional display name for this Infomaniak kChat channel account.

enabled.description: Whether the Infomaniak kChat channel scaffold is enabled.

tokenEnvName.description: Environment variable name used for the Infomaniak API bearer token.

teamName.description: Default kChat team name used when resolving channel names.

apiBaseUrl.description: Team-specific kChat API base URL. Defaults to https://<teamName>.kchat.infomaniak.com when teamName is configured.

defaultChannel.description: Default kChat destination. Supports id:<channel_id>, #channel, channel, or team/channel.

setOnline.description: Whether kChat should set the authenticated user online when creating posts.

typingIndicator.description: Whether inbound kChat replies should publish a native typing indicator while OpenClaw is preparing a reply.

setOnlineOnReplyStart.description: Whether inbound kChat replies should manually set the authenticated user online before publishing typing. Defaults to true when setOnline is true.

receiveMode.description: Inbound receive mode. Use websocket to receive kChat/Mattermost events without a public webhook callback URL.

websocketProtocol.description: WebSocket protocol to use. Infomaniak kChat uses infomaniak-echo; plain Mattermost servers may use mattermost.

webhookPath.description: Gateway HTTP path that receives kChat outgoing webhook events.

outgoingWebhookTokenEnvName.description: Environment variable name used for the kChat outgoing webhook verification token.

ignoredUserIds.description: kChat user IDs to ignore for inbound webhook events, typically the API posting account.

ignoredUserNames.description: kChat usernames to ignore for inbound webhook events, typically the API posting account.

websocketChannelScope.description: WebSocket inbound channel scope. Use all to accept every visible channel, or selected to require websocketChannelIds.

websocketUrl.description: Optional explicit WebSocket URL. Defaults to the Infomaniak Echo socket URL or the Mattermost /api/v4/websocket URL based on websocketProtocol.

websocketHost.description: Infomaniak Echo WebSocket host used when websocketProtocol is infomaniak-echo.

websocketAppKey.description: Infomaniak Echo/Pusher app key used when websocketProtocol is infomaniak-echo.

websocketAuthEndpoint.description: Optional Infomaniak Echo private-channel auth endpoint. Defaults to <apiBaseUrl>/broadcasting/auth.

websocketSubscriptions.description: Optional explicit Infomaniak Echo subscription channel names. Defaults to private-team.<team_id> and presence-teamUser.<user_id>.

websocketTeamId.description: Optional kChat team ID override for Infomaniak Echo subscriptions.

websocketTeamUserId.description: Optional kChat team user ID override for Infomaniak Echo subscriptions.

websocketChannelIds.description: Optional kChat channel IDs to accept from the WebSocket stream. When omitted, all visible posted events are accepted.

websocketDedupeWindowMs.description: Milliseconds to suppress duplicate WebSocket posts by post id. Set to 0 to disable duplicate suppression.

websocketDispatchConcurrency.description: Maximum number of WebSocket post events dispatched into OpenClaw at the same time.

websocketDispatchQueueSize.description: Maximum number of WebSocket post events waiting for dispatch before new events are dropped.
